resources.string:
"Friend Location Tracking App
Version 1.0

A simple app to track friends' locations in real-time using the Matrix protocol."

"How to use:
1. Grant location permissions.
2. Ensure you have an active internet connection.
3. Your location will be shared with friends in the configured Matrix room.
4. Friends' locations will appear as red markers on the map."
This app needs location permissions to track your movement and display your position on the map.
